message:
feat(ftui-pty): add IRM/DECAWM + fix ANSI mode borrow checker error

Add insert/replace mode (IRM, ANSI mode 4) and auto-wrap mode (DECAWM,
DEC private mode 7) to VirtualTerminal. IRM shifts existing chars right
on insert; DECAWM controls wrap vs clamp at right margin. Soft reset and
RIS properly restore defaults.

Fix borrow checker error in ANSI mode set/reset handlers by cloning
csi_params before iterating (same pattern used for DEC private modes).
Fix clippy single-match lint in set_ansi_mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
